# GitHub Marketplace Listing for DevKits

## Listing Details

**Product Name:** DevKits - Developer Tools Collection

**Category:** Developer Tools

**Short Description:**
Free collection of 82+ essential developer tools: JSON formatter, Base64, JWT decoder, Regex tester, and more. All client-side, privacy-focused.

**Long Description:**

DevKits is a comprehensive collection of free developer tools designed to streamline your daily workflow. All processing happens client-side in your browser, ensuring complete privacy and instant results.

### Included Tools

**Data Formatting:**
- JSON Format/Validate - Format, validate, and beautify JSON data
- Base64 Encode/Decode - Convert data to/from Base64 format
- URL Encode/Decode - Encode or decode URL strings
- Markdown to HTML - Convert Markdown to HTML
- YAML to JSON / JSON to YAML - Convert between YAML and JSON formats
- CSV to JSON / JSON to CSV - Convert between CSV and JSON formats
- XML to JSON / JSON to XML - Convert between XML and JSON formats

**Development Tools:**
- JWT Decode - Decode and inspect JSON Web Tokens
- Regex Tester - Test and validate regular expressions
- Cron Expression Parser - Parse and validate cron expressions
- Diff Checker - Compare text differences side by side
- SQL Formatter - Format and beautify SQL queries
- XML Formatter - Format and validate XML
- CSS/JS/HTML Minifier - Minify CSS, JavaScript, and HTML
- CSS/JS/HTML Beautifier - Beautify minified code

**Utilities:**
- Hash Generator - Generate SHA-1, SHA-256, SHA-512, MD5 hashes
- UUID v4 Generator - Generate random UUID v4 identifiers
- QR Code Generator - Generate QR codes
- Password Generator - Generate secure random passwords
- Lorem Ipsum Generator - Generate placeholder text
- Timestamp Converter - Convert between timestamp formats
- Color Converter - Convert between color formats
- IP Address Validator - Validate IPv4/IPv6 addresses
- Email Validator - Validate email addresses
- Phone Number Validator - Validate phone numbers

### Key Features

- **100% Free** - No registration required, no paywalls
- **Privacy First** - All processing happens client-side
- **Fast** - Instant results with no server round-trip
- **Offline Ready** - Works without internet connection
- **Open Source** - Transparent and community-driven

### Pricing

**Free** - All tools are completely free to use.

### Support

- Documentation: https://aiforeverthing.com
- Email: support@aiforeverthing.com
- Issues: https://github.com/hezeclark1987/devkits-github-app/issues

### Links

- Homepage: https://aiforeverthing.com
- Privacy Policy: https://aiforeverthing.com/privacy
- Terms of Service: https://aiforeverthing.com/terms
- Source Code: https://github.com/hezeclark1987/devkits-github-app

## Submission Checklist

- [x] GitHub repository created (hezeclark1987/devkits-github-app)
- [x] README.md with documentation
- [x] LICENSE file (MIT)
- [x] Privacy Policy (privacy.md)
- [x] Terms of Service (terms.md)
- [x] Manifest.json configured
- [x] All required URLs are valid

## GitHub Marketplace Submission Process

GitHub Marketplace **cannot be submitted via API** - it requires manual browser interaction:

### Step 1: Create GitHub App from Manifest

Visit the following URL (generated from manifest.json):

```
https://github.com/settings/apps/new?
```

This will auto-populate all app settings from the manifest.

### Step 2: Add to Marketplace

After creating the GitHub App:

1. Go to Settings > Developer settings > GitHub Apps > DevKits
2. Scroll to "Marketplace" section
3. Click "List in Marketplace"
4. Complete the listing form:
   - Category: Developer Tools
   - Pricing: Free
   - Verify all URLs are correct
5. Click "Submit for review"

### Step 3: Wait for Approval

- Review time: Typically 3-5 business days
- GitHub team will contact you at: support@aiforeverthing.com
- You'll be notified via email when approved

## Requirements Met

All GitHub Marketplace requirements for free apps are met:

- [x] Valid contact information (support@aiforeverthing.com)
- [x] Relevant description of the application
- [x] Pricing plan specified (Free)
- [x] Valid privacy policy link
- [x] Valid support link
- [x] All links work and resolve correctly
- [x] App provides value to GitHub community
- [x] App is publicly accessible
- [x] No webhook events required for free app

## Notes

- **FREE APP** - Does not require publisher verification
- **NO webhook setup required** - Free apps don't need marketplace events
- **82+ tools** - Comprehensive developer toolkit
- **Client-side processing** - Privacy-focused, no server storage
